etymology.description: 穴(穴) (xué, "cave") + 目(目) (mù, "eye") + 手(手) (shǒu, "hand") holding 支(支) (zhī, "branch") -> conveying authority with an eye and a hand holding authority
etymology.interpretation: The character 夐(xuàn, "eminent") combines a cave (穴) with an eye (目) and a hand (手) holding a stick (支) to symbolize authority and watchfulness, suggesting one who is in a position of power and eminence.
